posts.author: bennyarts (Benjamin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

For some reason, I’m not able to add the ‘text fields’ widget anymore, which gave me the ability to create a custom view with multiple text field when opening tasks and to hide the fields that were not relevant. (see attachment)

I can only add the ‘text column’ widget with 1 text field at a time or add the ‘Information’ widget which doesn’t give me the ability to make the text fields bigger.
Anyone an idea what the problem is here?

Thanks!

Screenshot 2025-05-28 at 10.52.001196×1602 26.5 KB

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Which product (CRM/Work Management, etc) and level (Pro/Enterprise) do you have? Options vary
